210 g/m² , 93% m-Aramid 5% p-Aramid 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic, 2/1S Twill Fabric

Aramid twill fabric consisting of 210 g/m², 93% m-Aramid, 5% p-Aramid, 2% Carbon. Inherent flame retardant fabric for wildland firefighters, oil and gas industry workers.
